_comment: Mock CPCB/CAAQMS telemetry replay for Shivajinagar, Pune. The sequence walks from clean air (AQI 90) into a crustal/PM10 spike (AQI 310) with a gentle ramp so that ONLY the final 08:30 reading trips the rate-of-change rule. Each entry is a 30-minute step. Pollutant values are in their NAAQS units (CO in mg/m3, others ug/m3). The 08:30 spike values match data_contract_sample.json exactly.
